CVE-2017-5630.title: PECL in the download utility class in the Installer in PEAR Base  ...
CVE-2017-5630.description: PECL in the download utility class in the Installer in PEAR Base System v1.10.1 does not validate file types and filenames after a redirect, which allows remote HTTP servers to overwrite files via crafted responses, as demonstrated by a .htaccess overwrite.
